title: Cat Litter Tray Large with Scoop – Open Top Cat Litter Box with Detachable Rim – Non Stick Easy Clean Tray with Splash Guard for Cats Kitten – Grey & White 46 x 35 x 22cm
features: SPACIOUS & COMFORTABLE – Large litter tray offers generous room for cats to move freely, giving kittens, adults and senior cats a stress-free and comfortable toilet space they will naturally return to.
MESS CONTROL WITH SPLASH GUARD – Raised detachable rim prevents litter scatter and helps contain spills, ensuring floors stay clean and reducing the need for constant sweeping or vacuuming.

QUICK & EASY CLEANING – Smooth non-stick surface stops litter from clumping and sticking, making cleaning effortless. Simply wipe or rinse the tray to maintain hygiene and keep odours under control with less effort.
OPEN TOP EASY ACCESS – Open design makes entry and exit simple, especially for kittens, older cats or pets who prefer visibility, while giving them more comfort, freedom and reassurance when in use.
PURENEST PROMISE – Thoughtfully designed for pets and owners, offering reliable quality and convenience. Count on PureNest for practical solutions that keep cats happy and homes fresher every day.

Cat Litter Tray Merchant video Why choose PureNest Cat Litter Tray? Our tray combines comfort for cats with practicality for owners. Spacious, easy to clean, and designed with a splash guard, it makes litter time stress-free while keeping your home tidy. Is this tray suitable for kittens and senior cats? Yes, the open-top design makes it easy for both kittens and older cats to access comfortably and safely. How easy is it to clean the tray? The non-stick surface prevents litter clumps from sticking. Simply wipe down or rinse with water for fast and hygienic cleaning. Does it include a scoop? Yes, every PureNest Cat Litter Tray comes with a durable scoop for quick and hassle-free daily waste removal. What are the tray dimensions? The tray measures 46L x 35W x 22H cm, providing a spacious litter area suitable for cats of all sizes.
